_comment: Self-contained config for the harness's HEADLESS WORKTREE AGENTS, loaded by harness/run.ts runAgent() via `claude --settings <this file>` (command-line precedence = highest). It carries everything the autonomous agents need: (1) blanks ANTHROPIC_API_KEY so they authenticate on the Max-plan claude.ai login (the global ~/.claude env-block key is credit-starved); (2) the tool allowlist (adapted to this repo: panel/server/science/host live under python/synapse/); (3) the never-push / never-merge / no-rm-rf / no-edit-VERSION denies. These DENIES live HERE — not in .claude/settings.json — so the 'promotion is human' safety binds the autonomous agents WITHOUT restricting the human's interactive session. Worktrees still inherit hooks from the committed .claude/settings.json.
